cast.name: 查尔斯·哈格蒂 Charles Hagerty

introduction: This series investigates eight key disasters of the last century. Weaving first-hand accounts, archive, interviews with leading experts, and stunning CGI, it fully immerses viewers in the events that led to final fateful moments of each disaster.S2 E1 Surfside Condo CollapseS2 E2 Texas BlackoutS2 E3 Iran Hostage CrisisS2 E4 Boston Marathon BombingS2 E5 Mount St. HelensS2 E6 The Opioid CrisisS2 E7 Fukushima Nuclear DisasterS2 E8 The Waco SiegeExecutive Producers: Andra Heritage, Dan Chambers, Tim Evans
